title: Giant Jungle Tree
description: Adds a giant jungle tree to the jungle biome
body:
**Giant Jungle Tree**

This simple mod adds a giant jungle tree to the jungle biomes

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aaf30e196437fa17b9b50ce1277dfa82ef76946.jpeg)

- The terrain around the jungle tree is designed to blend naturally with the jungle biomes
- Perfect spot to build a base nearby

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f34f917d38045b451b4ecc588a1b94e158cf509e.jpeg)

- The tree spawns in jungle and sparse jungle biomes


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
